TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Qqway, title = Qqway, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Qqway} }

S.FORM: qqway ryax maku' mqyanux qani ga, kya nanak soni' minxal saku' mita' kinqruzyux iyal qqway nani. laxi tcingi na qqway qu pyatu'! pkkisit su' lma. . qinzyuqan maku' kwara' ngabih ru qqway la. . cyux nya' stpaq rhzyal qu qqway nya'. . ha, nanu'?! ssaki' su' mami' qu qqway qani? nyux su' ini' knguciq ga! 啊,

qqway ryax maku' mqyanux qani ga, kya nanak soni' minxal saku' mita' kinqruzyux iyal qqway nani. laxi tcingi na qqway qu pyatu'! pkkisit su' lma. . qinzyuqan maku' kwara' ngabih ru qqway la. . cyux nya' stpaq rhzyal qu qqway nya'. . ha, nanu'?! ssaki' su' mami' qu qqway qani? nyux su' ini' knguciq ga! 啊,
S.PHON: qqwaj rjax makuʔ mqjanux qani ɣa, kja nanak s~ɕoniʔ minxal s~ɕakuʔ mitaʔ kinqruzjux ijal qqwaj nani. laxi tʦ~ʨiŋi na qqwaj qu pjatuʔ! pkkis~ɕit s~ɕuʔ lma. . qinzjuqan makuʔ kwaraʔ ŋaβiħ ru qqwaj la. . ʦ~ʨjux njaʔ s~ɕtpaq rħzjal qu qqwaj njaʔ. . ħa, nanuʔ?! s~ɕs~ɕakiʔ s~ɕuʔ mamiʔ qu qqwaj qani? njux s~ɕuʔ iniʔ kŋuʦ~ʨiq ɣa! *,
